title: Document Distributed EC2 Deployment for LICHEN Simulation
description: Document Distributed EC2 Deployment for LICHEN Simulation - Develop comprehensive documentation for deploying LICHEN simulation infrastructure across multiple AWS EC2 instances for large-scale distributed mesh testing. Include deployment methods, scaling strategies, resource requirements, and best practices for heterogeneous mesh testing using the simulation validation framework. This work supports the broader Epic: Complete Simulation Infrastructure Enhancement Epic.
close_reason: Updated docs/simulation-infrastructure-deployment.md with accurate SimulatorServer details, fleet script usage, heterogeneous architecture, AWS tagging rules, clean worktree references, and cross-references to enhanced-debugging and renode-workflow. Removed outdated Docker/Redis mentions. Verified against current ec2-*.sh scripts and sim/server.py.
